name: Claude Code
project_binding_recipe: Bind the repo once, then explicitly expose each existing vault item the repo needs. HASP may create neutral aliases such as secret_01, but day-to-day agent use should prefer named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY.
approval_path: Prefer the wrapper or launcher path, then let hasp mcp auto-open the daemon-backed session and grant project/session or window access inside the broker as needed; hasp session grant-plaintext is the operator path when plaintext is explicitly required.
safe_inject_path: Use hasp_run or hasp_inject through the MCP stdio transport, preferably with named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY instead of recalling secret_01 or revealing plaintext.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env or hasp_write_env-equivalent MCP tooling with explicit convenience approval.
